common.disclaimer: Unofficial fan project — not affiliated with Jutge.org or the UPC.

login.intro: Use your Jutge.org credentials. Your token stays in memory only — we never store your password.
login.loadSnapshotHint: Open a JSON file you saved earlier — works offline, no login required.

dateRange.heading: When should we look?
dateRange.intro: Pick the dates for your Wrapped stats. Custom ranges are built from your submission history.
dateRange.invalidRange: Start date must be on or before end date.
dateRange.loadSnapshotHint: Use a JSON file you exported from Wrapped — no API calls needed.
dateRange.presetNoOverlap: Your Jutge activity ({{min}} – {{max}}) does not overlap {{label}}.
dateRange.presetNoSubmissions: No submissions in {{label}} within your activity dates ({{start}} – {{end}}).

intro.subtitle: {{period}} · your Jutge identity has been verified.
intro.problemSuccessRate: {{rate}}% of attempted problems reached acceptance in this period.

drilldown.empty: No items to show for this metric.

share.title: Show off your stats
share.subtitle: Export images to post on social media or send to friends.
share.calendarHint: A clean GitHub-style activity map — just your submission heatmap, no extra slide chrome.
share.slideHint: Use the share button in the top bar on any slide to export what you're viewing.

chrono.narrativePeak: You peak around {{hour}}:00 — a {{archetype}} on campus time.
chrono.narrativeNight: {{count}} submissions landed between midnight and 5 AM.

verdicts.narrativeClean: You logged {{ac}} fully accepted submissions out of {{total}}.
verdicts.narrativeFriction: Across {{total}} submissions, you earned {{ac}} AC verdicts while battling {{count}} {{label}} along the way.

ranking.subtitle: {{period}} · {{elite}}
ranking.usersAhead: You rank above {{count}} of {{total}} Jutge users

hero.label: Your standout problem
hero.grindDetail: {{attempts}} tries before your first AC — {{submissions}} total.

slowSolve.label: Longest time to solve
slowSolve.headline: <0>{{problem}}</0> took <1>{{duration}}</1> to solve
slowSolve.detail: from first submission to first AC.

firstAttempt.label: First attempt
firstAttempt.headline: You solved <0>{{percent}}%</0> on the first try

compileGrief.label: Compile grief
compileGrief.headline: <0>{{count}}</0> compilation errors
compileGrief.detail: {{percent}}% of your submissions · Jutge is not your compiler

share.httpsRequired: Native sharing only works over HTTPS. For local testing on your phone, run npm run dev:host. End users on the deployed GitHub Pages site will not see this message.

templates.intro: My Jutge.org Wrapped! Level {{level}} ({{name}}). Accepted: {{accepted}}, Submissions: {{submissions}}, AC Rate: {{acRate}}%!
templates.heatmap_stats: My Jutge.org Wrapped! Active Days: {{activeDays}}, Longest Streak: {{longestStreak}} days!
templates.heatmap_calendar: My Jutge.org Wrapped! {{submissions}} submissions across {{activeDays}} active days — check out my activity calendar!
templates.rhythm: My Jutge.org Wrapped! Busiest day: {{busiestDay}}, peak hour {{peakHour}}:00 — {{archetype}}!
templates.verdict: My Jutge.org Wrapped! AC runs: {{ac}} ({{acRate}}% AC rate)!

cors.title: Connection blocked?
cors.hintCredentials: Confirm your email and password are correct.
cors.hintCors: If login works on jutge.org but not here, your browser may be blocking cross-origin requests to <0>api.jutge.org</0>.
cors.hintExtensions: Try disabling strict privacy extensions for this site.

errors.network: Could not reach the Jutge API. This is often caused by browser CORS restrictions or network issues.
errors.invalidRange: Your date range is reversed ({{start}} is after {{end}}). Go back and pick a valid range.
errors.emptyRangeSnapshot: No submissions in {{label}}. Try a wider range, or re-export your snapshot (npm run export:snapshot) so it includes full submission history.
errors.emptyRange: You had no Jutge submissions between {{label}}. Choose a different range, or pick All time.
errors.loadFailureEmpty: We couldn't load your submission history from Jutge. Try again in a moment, or pick All time.
errors.loadFailure: Something went wrong while loading your submissions. Try again, or pick All time.

donut.compilerAria: Compiler distribution. Click a segment for details.
donut.verdictAria: Verdict distribution. Click a segment for details.
